avgCost() - Method in class qsim.ScreenerProfile
Computes the average processing time for the triangular or uniform distribution.

B

bracket(int) - Method in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
The two profiles, "lower" (0) and "higher" (1), bracketing the desired detection rate.

completed - Variable in class qsim.Queue
Those whose processing has been completed already
containsKey(String) - Method in class qsim.ParseConfig
 
countCurrentlyScreened - Variable in class qsim.Parameters
How the customer that's currently being screened is counted for the purposes of measuring the queue length

The factory method creates a Policy object to be used in the simulator.

CrowdPanel - Class in qsim.gui
Panel for drawing the crowd graph in the Qsim GUI (QsimGUI).

CrowdPresentedData.VerticalSegment - Class in qsim.gui
Auxiliary class used for drawing a single vertical segment representing multiple points with visibly the same x
currentLambda(double) - Method in class qsim.Parameters
 
currentProfileID - Variable in class qsim.Queue
Points to a position in myprofiles

D

d - Variable in class qsim.ScreenerProfile
Detection rate, in the 0.0 to 1.0 range
dAcceptable - Variable in class qsim.Parameters
 
dAcceptable - Variable in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
 
debug(String) - Static method in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 
debugln(String) - Static method in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 
debugMode - Static variable in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 
defaultSpeedBatch - Static variable in class qsim.Options
Simulation speed, in terms of seconds of simulated time per a second of wall clock time.
defaultSpeedInteractive - Static variable in class qsim.Options
Simulation speed, in terms of seconds of simulated time per a second of wall clock time.
defaultT - Static variable in class qsim.Options
 
describe() - Method in class qsim.Qsim
 
describeLambda() - Method in class qsim.Parameters
 
describeQueue() - Method in class qsim.Queue
Who's in line?
describeQueue2(boolean, int) - Method in class qsim.Queue
 
detected - Variable in class qsim.Queue.Arrival
Is set to true after screening has completed, if the arriving customer was a "threat" and was detected as such
detectedCnt - Variable in class qsim.Queue
Counting screened customers (all; detected threat; missed threat)
detects() - Method in class qsim.ScreenerProfile
Randomly returns true, with the probability equal to this profile's detection rate
display - Variable in class qsim.Qsim
 
display(int, Queue) - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimPanel.GuiProgressDisplay
Updates info text for the j-th lane
display(int, Queue) - Method in class qsim.Qsim.ProgressDisplay
Displays stats for one lane
doneCnt() - Method in class qsim.Queue
Same as allCnt
drawGrid(Graphics2D, Dimension, double, double, String, boolean) - Static method in class qsim.gui.PresentedData
Draws a suitably spaced grid for the argument range [0:realWidth] x [0:realHeight]

F

filedir - Variable in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 
fileMenu - Variable in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 
findNextActivityTime() - Method in class qsim.Queue
Looks up the next event in this lane that needs to be attended to.
findScreenerProfile(ParseConfig, String) - Static method in class qsim.ScreenerProfile
Looks for the parameters of a screener profile in the option store
finishedGeneration() - Method in class qsim.Queue
Switch this queue to using a pre-created (static) arrivals schedule (probably, read from a file), instead of generating arrival times dynamically.
fmt - Static variable in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
 
fracBad - Variable in class qsim.Parameters
The fraction of "bad" customers among the arrivals
fracUseHigher - Variable in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
What percentage of lanes should be allocated to the "higher" profile in pure (static) P2

G

gen - Static variable in class qsim.Qsim
 
genCnt - Variable in class qsim.Queue
How many customers have been generated by the arrival generator
generateAllArrivalTimes() - Method in class qsim.Queue
Prepares the list of para.nGenMax arrival times, to save in a file for use in a future run
GenerateArrivals - Class in qsim
An auxiliary application for generating arrival schedules, for use in Qsim runs.
GenerateArrivals() - Constructor for class qsim.GenerateArrivals
 
generateArrivalSchedule(File) - Method in class qsim.Qsim
Generates and saves customer arrival schedule, for future use.

getLong(String, long) - Method in class qsim.ParseConfig
 
getNow() - Method in class qsim.Qsim
The local simulated time (sec)
getOption(String, boolean) - Method in class qsim.ParseConfig
Gets the requested integer value from the hash table or from the Java system property aName.
getOption(String, int) - Method in class qsim.ParseConfig
Gets the requested integer value from the hash table or from the Java system property aName.
getOption(String, String) - Method in class qsim.ParseConfig
Gets the requested value from the hash table or from the Java system property aName.
getOptionDate(String, String) - Method in class qsim.ParseConfig
Gets a date parameter, in the format YYYY-MM-DD
getOptionDouble(String, double) - Method in class qsim.ParseConfig
Gets the requested double value from the hash table or from the Java system property aName.
getOptionEnum(Class<T>, String, T) - Method in class qsim.ParseConfig
Returns the value of the specified parameter if it can be interpreted as a value of the specified enumerated type.

getParameter(String) - Method in class qsim.ParseConfig
Gets the requested value from the hash table.

Checks if this lane wants to give its first customer to another lane.

Invokes the constructor of an appropriate Group class or subclass.

H

H - Variable in class qsim.ScreenerProfile
Parameters of the uniform or triangular distribution of the processing time.
handleIdle(long) - Method in class qsim.Queue
If this lane is idle but there is work to do (here or at a broken neighbor), engage it into this work
handleImmediateArrival(long) - Method in class qsim.Queue
If a customer arrives right now, handle that
handleImmediateScreeningCompletion(long) - Method in class qsim.Queue
Completes a screening if it's happening right now
hasBeenScreenedForHowLong(long) - Method in class qsim.Queue.Arrival
How much time has elapsed since screening started on this customer, as fraction of the maximum time that screening may take.
hasNext() - Method in class qsim.StaticArrivalSchedule
 
hasOneOfTheShorterQueues(int, Queue[], double) - Static method in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
Does Lane no.

L

L - Variable in class qsim.Parameters
The number of screening lanes
L - Variable in class qsim.Qsim
 
L - Variable in class qsim.ScreenerProfile
Parameters of the uniform or triangular distribution of the processing time.
labels - Variable in class qsim.gui.QsimPanel
 
lambda - Variable in class qsim.Parameters
Customer arrival rate (avg customers per unit of time, per lane).
lambdaGrowthRate - Variable in class qsim.Parameters
Indicates the rate of change of lambda with time (linear growth or decrease).
lanes - Variable in class qsim.Qsim
 
lastBrokenLaneDelta - Variable in class qsim.Queue
From which broken lane (this+1 or this-1?) did we take a customer last time? (Sometimes the value can go beyond +1 or -1, if there are several broken lanes next to each other)
layout(int) - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimPanel
 
lowBracketID - Variable in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
Pointer to the low bracket

M

M - Variable in class qsim.ScreenerProfile
Parameters of the uniform or triangular distribution of the processing time.

Purely for testing.
main(String[]) - Static method in class qsim.Qsim
 
makeGraphTitle() - Method in class qsim.gui.PresentedData
Produces a brief description of the graph, to be displayed above it
missedCnt - Variable in class qsim.Queue
Counting screened customers (all; detected threat; missed threat)
msgLabel - Variable in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 
MyJFrame - Class in qsim.gui
 
MyJFrame(String) - Constructor for class qsim.gui.MyJFrame
 
myprofiles - Variable in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
All profiles supported by this lane's screening device.
myprofiles - Variable in class qsim.Queue
All profiles supported by this lane's screening device

N

n - Variable in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
Number of lanes that have this set of profiles
name - Variable in class qsim.Policy
 
NEVER - Static variable in class qsim.Queue
 
next() - Method in class qsim.StaticArrivalSchedule
 
nextArrival(long) - Method in class qsim.Queue
Returns a newly generated Arrival object, or null (if all planned arrivals have already been generated).
nextArrivalTime(long) - Method in class qsim.Queue
Generates the arrival time of the next customer in this line, using the Poisson distribution with the pre-set lambda (which itself may be a function of time).
nGenMax - Variable in class qsim.Parameters
The total number of arrivals to generate in each lane, after which the generator stops.
NO - Enum constant in enum class qsim.Parameters.CountCurrentlyScreened
 
NT - Static variable in class qsim.PolicyP3.GroupP3
 
numberOfLanesToHelp(int, int) - Method in class qsim.Qsim
How many broken lanes does Lane mypos (which is assumed to be a working lane) need to help? (This depends on whether there is a capable "helper" on the other side).

O

odFmt - Static variable in class qsim.Qsim
 
openArrivalsFile() - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 
openConfig() - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
Reads config paramters
optionDialog() - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 
OptionDialog - Class in qsim.gui
Displaying option values and allowing the user to edit them
options - Static variable in class qsim.Options
The option table.
Options - Class in qsim
This class stores a few static members, which are values of certain options for the queue similator algorithm.
Options() - Constructor for class qsim.Options
 
optionsMenu - Variable in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 
ownPatronCnt - Variable in class qsim.Queue
How many customers we will screen before taking a customer from an adjacent broken lane
ownPatronCnt0 - Static variable in class qsim.Queue
This parameter controls how frequently a working screening lane can accept customers from nearby broken lanes.

P

P0 - Enum constant in enum class qsim.Parameters.Policy
 
P1 - Enum constant in enum class qsim.Parameters.Policy
 
P2 - Enum constant in enum class qsim.Parameters.Policy
 
p2assign() - Method in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
 
P3 - Enum constant in enum class qsim.Parameters.Policy
 
paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class qsim.gui.CrowdPanel
Paints the component (to the screen).
paintPlot(Graphics2D, boolean, Qsim) - Method in class qsim.gui.PresentedData
Paints the frontier (and any auxiliary data) on a specified Graphics2D object.
paintPlot(Graphics2D, Dimension, boolean, Qsim) - Method in class qsim.gui.CrowdPresentedData
 
paintPlot(Graphics2D, Dimension, boolean, Qsim) - Method in class qsim.gui.PresentedData
Not supported in the parent class; children must implement
para - Variable in class qsim.Qsim
 
para - Variable in class qsim.Queue
 
Parameters - Class in qsim
Model parameters and algorithm parameters.
Parameters(File) - Constructor for class qsim.Parameters
Initializes the parameters from a file or from system properties.
Parameters.CountCurrentlyScreened - Enum Class in qsim
The legal values for the configuration parameter "policy.countCurrentlyScreened", which is used to control how the customer that's currently being screened is counted for the purposes of measuring the queue length
Parameters.ParseException - Exception Class in qsim
Thrown when an error is found in the config file
Parameters.Policy - Enum Class in qsim
The available policies for the selection of screener profiles
parent - Variable in class qsim.gui.CrowdPanel
 
parent - Variable in class qsim.gui.QsimPanel
 
ParseConfig - Class in qsim
This class is used to obtain configuration paramters, from a configuration file or from Java System Properties.
ParseConfig() - Constructor for class qsim.ParseConfig
Creates an empty hashtable.
ParseConfig(File) - Constructor for class qsim.ParseConfig
Creates a hashtable that contains the parsed contents of the specified configuration file.
ParseConfig(Reader) - Constructor for class qsim.ParseConfig
Creates a hashtable that contains the parsed data obtained from an open reader (which may, for example, be associated with an open file), and then closes the reader.
ParseConfig(String) - Constructor for class qsim.ParseConfig
 
ParseException(File, LineNumberReader, String) - Constructor for exception class qsim.Parameters.ParseException
 
ParseException(String) - Constructor for exception class qsim.Parameters.ParseException
 
PARTIALLY - Enum constant in enum class qsim.Parameters.CountCurrentlyScreened
 
pending - Variable in class qsim.Queue
The one not in queue yet.
plotCrowdData(Vector<long[]>) - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimPanel.GuiProgressDisplay
Plots the updated historical crowd size graph
plotCrowdData(Vector<long[]>) - Method in class qsim.Qsim.ProgressDisplay
Plots the updated historical crowd size graph
policy - Variable in class qsim.Parameters
The screening profile selection policy
policy - Variable in class qsim.Qsim
Controls the choice of screener profiles for each lane.
Policy - Class in qsim
A policy determines how we choose the screener profile for each lane that has multiple profiles available.
Policy() - Constructor for class qsim.Policy
 
PolicyP0 - Class in qsim
This is a dynamic profile selecting policy.
PolicyP0(Queue[], double) - Constructor for class qsim.PolicyP0
 
PolicyP1 - Class in qsim
Paul's policy P1: fixed assignment of lanes to policies
PolicyP1(Queue[], double) - Constructor for class qsim.PolicyP1
 
PolicyP2 - Class in qsim
Paul's policy P2 provides for dynamic assignment of lanes to screening profiles.
PolicyP2(Queue[], double) - Constructor for class qsim.PolicyP2
 
PolicyP2.Group - Class in qsim
A Group instance describes all lanes with the same set of profiles.
PolicyP2.Group.QueueComparatorByLength - Class in qsim
 
PolicyP3 - Class in qsim
policy P3: giving out "tickets" for F[ast] and S[low], to ensure proper detection rate.
PolicyP3(Queue[], double) - Constructor for class qsim.PolicyP3
 
PolicyP3.GroupP3 - Class in qsim
 
prefix - Static variable in class qsim.ParseConfig
 
presented - Variable in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
The tool for displaying crowd size plot
PresentedData - Class in qsim.gui
Used to plot the crowd-againts-time curve
PresentedData() - Constructor for class qsim.gui.PresentedData
 
profileIndexes - Variable in class qsim.Parameters
For Lane j, profileIndexes[j] contains the list of profiles (zero-bases indexes into profiles[]) supported by that lane.
profiles - Variable in class qsim.Parameters
All profiles that can be available to any screening device.
ProgressDisplay() - Constructor for class qsim.Qsim.ProgressDisplay
 

Q

qsim - package qsim
Qsim - Multiline screening simulation application
qsim - Variable in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
The queue simulator whose behavior is displayed in the GUI
Qsim - Class in qsim
The main queue simulator class; simulates the behaviour of a battery of L lines
Qsim(Parameters, long, StaticArrivalSchedule[]) - Constructor for class qsim.Qsim
 
qsim.gui - package qsim.gui
GUI interface for the simulator
Qsim.ProgressDisplay - Class in qsim
This may be subclassed to provide necessary functionality
QsimGUI - Class in qsim.gui
The main Queue Simulation GUI driver
QsimGUI() - Constructor for class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
Creates a frame with all the components that are to be displayed.
QsimPanel - Class in qsim.gui
The main panel in the Qsim interactive GUI window (QsimGUI).
QsimPanel(int, int, QsimGUI) - Constructor for class qsim.gui.QsimPanel
Constructor for QsimPanel.
QsimPanel.CMD - Class in qsim.gui
 
QsimPanel.GuiProgressDisplay - Class in qsim.gui
A hook for Qsim to display simulation progress using this panel.
Queue - Class in qsim
A Queue object simulates a single screening lane.
Queue(Parameters, long, Qsim, int, StaticArrivalSchedule) - Constructor for class qsim.Queue
Creates a new lane, to be included into a Qsim object.
Queue.Arrival - Class in qsim
Encapsulates the information about a customer and his progress through the screening lane
Queue.ArrivalBase - Class in qsim
 
QueueComparatorByLength() - Constructor for class qsim.PolicyP2.Group.QueueComparatorByLength
 
queueLength() - Method in class qsim.Queue
Different ways of measuring the queue length: with or without the customer currently being screeened

R

readFile(File, int) - Static method in class qsim.StaticArrivalSchedule
Reads pre-created arrival schedules for multiple queues
releaseDate - Static variable in class qsim.Qsim
 
report(Queue[]) - Method in class qsim.Policy
May be overridden by individual policies to produce a performance report.
report(Queue[]) - Method in class qsim.PolicyP2
Reports this group's performance stats so far
report(Queue[], PolicyP2.Group[]) - Method in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
Reports on this group's lanes' operations so far
requestAttention() - Method in class qsim.Qsim
Called from the GUI if the user has changed the system state somehow, e.g.
requestStop() - Method in class qsim.Qsim
Called from the GUI if the user clicks the STOP button
RUN - Static variable in class qsim.gui.QsimPanel.CMD
 
runMenu - Variable in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 

S

saveLog() - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
Saves the log for this run, to the user-specified file.
saveLog(File) - Method in class qsim.Qsim
Saves the accummulated log information for this run.
scale - Variable in class qsim.Qsim
How many seconds of simulated time per 1 sec of real wall clock time.
sched - Variable in class qsim.Queue
This is used if we're using a pre-computed arrival schedule, loaded from a file.
screenedCntByProfile - Variable in class qsim.Queue
How many customers have been screened by each profile? These values sum to doneCnt
screenEndTime - Variable in class qsim.Queue.Arrival
Expected time of screening completion.
ScreenerProfile - Class in qsim
Describes a screener profile (performance and detection rate).
ScreenerProfile(long, long, double) - Constructor for class qsim.ScreenerProfile
Creates a profile with a uniform distribution
ScreenerProfile(long, long, long, double) - Constructor for class qsim.ScreenerProfile
Creates a profile with a triangular distribution
ScreenerProfile.Shape - Enum Class in qsim
The shape of the screener profile (uniform or triangular)
screenStartTime - Variable in class qsim.Queue.Arrival
 
serviceTime() - Method in class qsim.ScreenerProfile
Returns a random value in the range from L to H, subject to the uniform or triangular distribution with the mode at M.
set(Point) - Method in class qsim.gui.CrowdPresentedData.VerticalSegment
 
setBroken(boolean) - Method in class qsim.Queue
 
setInteractive(boolean) - Static method in class qsim.Options
 
setLabel(String) - Method in class qsim.gui.MyJFrame
Some method to produce a message to the user - maybe inside a label at the right place...

setLabel(String, String) - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI
 
setMenuEnabled(boolean) - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimGUI

setProgressDisplay(Qsim.ProgressDisplay) - Method in class qsim.Qsim
 
setRecommendedDim(Dimension) - Method in class qsim.gui.PresentedData
 
setSpeed(double) - Static method in class qsim.Options
 
setT(long) - Static method in class qsim.Options
 
shape - Variable in class qsim.ScreenerProfile
 
showDialog(Component, Component, String, String) - Static method in class qsim.gui.OptionDialog
Set up and show the dialog.
showProfiles() - Method in class qsim.Qsim
 
showStats2(String) - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimPanel.GuiProgressDisplay
 
showStats2(String) - Method in class qsim.Qsim.ProgressDisplay
Displays additional stats (multi-line text)
showSummary(String) - Method in class qsim.gui.QsimPanel.GuiProgressDisplay
 
showSummary(String) - Method in class qsim.Qsim.ProgressDisplay
Displays aggregate stats for all lanes (single line of text)
simulate(long) - Method in class qsim.Qsim
The main simulation loop.
size() - Method in class qsim.StaticArrivalSchedule
 
sp - Variable in class qsim.Queue.Arrival
The ScreenerProfile becomes associated with the Arrival object once processing starts, and remains associated with it as a permanent record
SPEED - Static variable in class qsim.Options
Just the option names, to avoid using quoted strings throughout the program
spID - Variable in class qsim.Queue.Arrival
Used as a reference to the screen profile in myprofiles[]
StaticArrivalSchedule - Class in qsim
A precomputed customer arrival schedule

statsLabel2 - Variable in class qsim.gui.QsimPanel

summaryText() - Method in class qsim.Qsim
 

T

T - Static variable in class qsim.Options
Just the option names, to avoid using quoted strings throughout the program

toString() - Method in class qsim.Parameters
 
toString() - Method in class qsim.Queue.Arrival
 
toString() - Method in class qsim.ScreenerProfile
 
transferred - Variable in class qsim.Queue.Arrival
This will be set to true if the customer has been ever transferred between lanes
transformPoint(AffineTransform, Point2D.Double) - Static method in class qsim.gui.CrowdPresentedData
Transforms q as per the specified affine transform, and then rounds the result's coordinates to int
TRIANGULAR - Enum constant in enum class qsim.ScreenerProfile.Shape
 
tryToInclude(Queue) - Method in class qsim.PolicyP2.Group
Checks whether a given screening lane can be enrolled into this group, and if so, increments this group's lane count.

V

Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
